title: Human Cognition and AI Oversight
scope: Cognitive biases, automation bias, oversight mechanisms and Cognition Case Studies deepdive.
source_label: M4 – Human Cognition and AI Oversight

assessments.title: Maths and Cognition Lab Report
assessments.requirement: Two-part PDF submission. Part 1 — Temperature experiment: run the same prompt 10x at temperature 0 and 10x at temperature 1; compute accuracy, variance, and write a 200-word statistical interpretation. Part 2 — Cognition case brief: apply all three Judgment Framework questions to a technical AI system in your domain with quantified acceptable error thresholds (one page). Graded on: statistical correctness, depth of Judgment Framework application.
